Notice Of Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Debra F. Bogaards, esq. (T:415-979-0480/C:415-385-4257) for Plaintiffs/Moving party OSCAR JIMENEZ, CYNTHYA AYALA, ROMEO AYALA-GARCIA, and LAILAH AYALA-GARCIA.
Andrew R. Catterall, esq. (415-956-8100) of Zacks, Freedman & Patterson for Defendant/opposing party 1370 Natoma LLC.

ARGUED. Plaintiff requested the court to set aside the ruling and continue the motion to complete depositions and leave to file 2nd amended complaint. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs OSCAR JIMENEZ, CYNTHYA AYALA, ROMEO AYALA-GARCIA, and LAILAH AYALA-GARCIA's Motion For Preliminary Injunction is DENIED without prejudice. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
